subject: French
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: 11.0: MY SCHOOL
topics: This topic is essential for learners as it provides foundational vocabulary and
expressions related to daily life in a school setting. By exploring classroom orders and
instructions, learners will learn how to navigate and communicate effectively in a
French speaking classroom environment. Understanding subjects and school time
activities:  Give instructions in French accompanied by gestures.
 Learners listen to a set of demonstrated instructions and respond appropriately.
e.g. Entrez !/ Venez ! Va a ta place ! Levez-vous.!
 In groups, learners find the meaning of the different classroom instructions
assessment: learning activities from all the sub-topics taught and the summative
